claim_boundary: Tier 5.20e is a software-only near-full resonant diagnostic after 5.20a/5.20b. It tests a same-budget 2 LIF / 14 resonant branch internal-polyp proxy against v2.3, v2.2, full-resonant, lag/reservoir/ESN controls, and 2/14 shams. It is not a canonical organism change, not hardware evidence, and not a baseline freeze.

classification.recommendation: Do not integrate the 2/14 resonant variant into the core organism.

nonclaims: not a custom SpiNNaker neuron model
near_full_resonant_contract.repair_target: test whether the near-full resonant specialist dose preserves v2.3 while retaining any variable-delay/anomaly value

diagnostics.lif_safe_approximation: branch-specific delay plus fast/slow low-pass traces
